3021.issue: [S3021] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 22 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.
